outputs.description: Unique identifier for the issue in Google Threat Intelligence. GoogleThreatIntelligenceASMIssues.Issues.success Indicates whether the API request to fetch issue details was successful.
outputs.name: GoogleThreatIntelligenceASMIssues.Issues.uid

outputs.description: Response message returned by the API, providing additional information. GoogleThreatIntelligenceASMIssues.Issues.result Result status or outcome returned by the API for the issue request.
outputs.name: GoogleThreatIntelligenceASMIssues.Issues.message
